title: Banks Designed Your Minimum Payment to Trap You
hook: Your minimum payment wasn't random — it was engineered to keep you paying interest for 16 years.
angle: Most people know minimum payments are bad, but the specific math showing you'll repay 148% of what you borrowed — and that banks deliberately calculated the 2% formula to maximize profit — is genuinely shocking.
audience: Anyone carrying credit card debt — roughly 1 in 3 American adults with a balance
key_numbers: 16 years to pay off at minimum payment
Pay $250/month instead: clear it in 2.4 years and save $6,200
